headline: Emerson Electric Co. (EMR) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
summary: Emerson Electric (EMR) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.

headline: Emerson and Strategic Biofuels to deliver renewable carbon-neutral power to Louisiana
summary: Emerson has been chosen to automate Strategic Biofuels’ US$2-billion Louisiana Green Fuels power facility in Caldwell Parish.
